data.title: Cerrado Gold responds to critique of Environmental Impact Assessment for Lagoa Salgada Project in Portugal.
data.description: Cerrado Gold has issued a response to a purportedly negative review of the Environmental Impact Assessment for their Lagoa Salgada Project in Portugal. The company states that the assessment is favorable and highlights the project's positive impact. The project, located in Portugal, aims to bring economic benefits to the region. Cerrado Gold emphasizes that the assessment reflects a thorough evaluation of the project's environmental effects, emphasizing its commitment to sustainable practices. The company remains confident in the potential of the project to contribute to the local economy and create jobs.

data.title: Coforge reports strong performance with revenue up 5.1% QoQ, 28.5% YoY, and 37.3% YTD.
data.description: Coforge, based in Princeton, New Jersey and New Delhi, experienced strong growth in the latest quarter. Their revenue increased by 5.1% quarter-over-quarter, 28.5% year-over-year, and reached a notable 37.3% year-to-date.

data.title: Weekly recap: 13 press releases featuring top companies like Netflix and Build-A-Bear.
data.description: In a recent update, Netflix has made an offer to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, adding to the list of the world's most esteemed companies. Additionally, Build-A-Bear has introduced a range of new products along with the return of popular items, joining the trend set by Red Bull and OREO. The news, dated January 23, 2026, from New York, encompasses the latest developments in the business world where companies compete, innovate, and capture the attention of consumers and investors.

data.title: Kansas legislators suggest creating a state-run reserve fund for Bitcoin and digital assets, aiming to hold abandoned assets and staking rewards.
data.description: The plan aims to have state custody of dormant digital assets, enabling staking rewards to be directed into a reserve fund.

data.title: Robo.ai teams up with The Ghazi Group to expand AI compute infrastructure in MENA and Southeast Asia. (Characters: 108)
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on January 23, 2026, Robo.ai Inc. (Nasdaq: AIIO), a firm known for AI-powered autonomous technologies, disclosed a significant development. This involves a newly established three-year Gold Reseller Agreement with The Ghazi Group ("TGG"), a comprehensive AI infrastructure and solutions firm. Under this agreement, Robo.ai Inc. will collaborate closely with TGG to provide advanced AI solutions to the market.

data.title: Amaze and Contend expand partnership for creator-led commerce, focusing on high-conversion product launches.
data.description: A long-standing advisory relationship has been taken to new heights through collaboration, merging the creative studio's expertise with global commerce capabilities to enhance product launches with high conversion rates. This collaboration brings together years of experience in providing effective solutions, combining creative flair with strategic marketing strategies to maximize success. By leveraging the strengths of both entities, this partnership aims to revolutionize product launches for optimal outcomes.

data.title: Options Technology deployed liquid-cooled high-density cage in Equinix NY5, setting new benchmark for managed service providers.
data.description: Options Technology, a top provider of high-performance infrastructure for the global financial services sector, revealed the launch of its innovative liquid-cooled high-density cage in NY5, Equinix’s International Business Exchange™ (IBX) data center in Secaucus, New Jersey. This move establishes Options as a key player in providing liquid-cooled colocation solutions for financial services clients. The development signifies a significant step for Options in catering to the increasing compute requirements of the sector.

data.title: Kansas proposed bill for a state-managed Bitcoin reserve, funded by unclaimed crypto & staking rewards, not direct purchases.
data.description: The plan aims to finance the reserve by utilizing unused cryptocurrency and returns from staking, instead of making direct Bitcoin purchases on behalf of the state.

data.title: Alcoa beats Q4 expectations with $3.45B revenue, $1.26 EPS; stock rises. Eyeing more output in 2026.
data.description: Alcoa Corporation's stock (NYSE: AA) experienced a rise following the release of its fourth-quarter results which surpassed expectations. The company reported a revenue of $3.45 billion, marking a 15% increase from the previous quarter and surpassing the anticipated $3.31 billion. Additionally, the adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.26, exceeding the expected $0.92. The adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA), excluding special items, amounted to $546 million, showing a $276 million increase from the previous quarter. This growth was supported by higher aluminum prices, CO₂ compensation recognition in Spain and Norway, and the absence of asset retirement obligation charges from the third quarter of fiscal 2025. In the Alumina segment, third-party revenue increased by 3% from the previous quarter.
